name_cn:
❤️Loro piana Small Bucket
Bale Mini Bag
Color: Marble Pink
The free-spirited elegance and timeless style of the Bale bag once again witness Loro piana's unique heritage. The square shape and name are derived from the bales used to store cashmere, representing Loro piana's dedication to craftsmanship. Made from calfskin, it features a very soft natural grain.
Size: 16✖️14✖️23CM
